title: Neural Turing Machines
summary: A type of neural network that uses a memory component to store and retrieve information. It sits inside Neural Networks / Core Models. Start after Neural Network and Neural Networks. It opens into Neural Turing Machines (NTM) and Neural Turing Machines (NTMs).
